description_long: This is a tall, narrow cabinet with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a vertically oriented rectangular form. The exterior is finished in a dark gray wood grain texture, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance suitable for urban environments. The front face has a single, full-length door with a subtle panel design and a small round knob, suggesting access to internal storage. The sides are plain, with the wood grain pattern continuing seamlessly, and the top is flat with a slight overhang, providing a modest decorative detail. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from engineered wood or laminate, with metal hardware for the door mechanism. Its proportions and style make it ideal for use in hallways, entryways, garages, or utility areas in urban settings.
description: A tall, narrow, dark gray wood-grain cabinet with a single front door and a minimalist, modern design. The cabinet features a flat top, subtle paneling, and a small round knob.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full-length door with panel detailing and a small round knob near the edge.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, continuous wood grain surface with no visible features except a slight hint of the knob.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, unadorned surface with the same wood grain texture, lacking any openings or hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain wood grain surface and no visible features.
